title: Tool Protocol
description: The loop stays fixed while tools become structured and specialized.

steps.content: Open README.md and fix the first heading if it is outdated.
steps.annotation: The request naturally mixes read and write operations.
The model now has a dedicated file-reading tool.
Structured tool results are easier to interpret than arbitrary shell output.

steps.content: {"path":"README.md","old_text":"# Old Course Title","new_text":"# Learn Real Claude Code"}
steps.annotation: The registry dispatches the request to a specialized editor.
The loop did not change; only the tool pool expanded.

steps.content: The heading is updated, and the change stayed narrowly scoped because the tool matched the intent.
steps.annotation: Tool protocol is the extensibility layer.
